title: cephalaria sparsipilosa
intro: Cephalaria sparsipilosa, also known as Scabious, is a flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia, characterized by its pink to purple flowers and hairy leaves. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, derived from its alkaloids and flavonoids. The health benefits of Cephalaria sparsipilosa include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds, coughs, and flu. Cephalaria sparsipilosa can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
